about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Who I am and what I deliver
about.bio: Full-Stack Developer focused on React, TypeScript and Node.js. I build complete products — from UI to back-end — with attention to quality, accessibility and team delivery.

education: Anhembi Morumbi — Systems Analysis and Development
Continuous learning in architecture and best practices

recruiter.bio: Professional summary for quick screening: React, TypeScript, Node.js and full stack delivery with product focus.
recruiter.aboutExtended: I work on end-to-end web products — architecture, APIs, interfaces and integrations. I have experience with technical leadership, code review and iterative delivery in teams. I look for roles where code quality and product impact go together.
recruiter.stackNote: I also work with MongoDB, Sass, C#, PHP and automation when the context calls for it.

easterEgg.sectionTourProgress: Tour progress — keep exploring the sections!

easterEgg.spaceModeActive: Space mode enabled — stars and nebula on the hero!
easterEgg.konamiActive: Konami code detected — purple accent for 30 seconds!

konami.name: Konami
konami.trigger: Arrow sequence + B + A on keyboard

logo.name: RV logo
logo.trigger: 5 quick clicks on the logo (no page reload)
logo.result: Blueprint mode: cyan grid overlay and glowing logo for 14 seconds

sectionTour.name: Section tour
sectionTour.trigger: Visit About, Stack, Projects and Contact
sectionTour.result: Each section pulses on visit; all glow when complete

rocket.name: Rocket
rocket.trigger: Send an email or message containing the word rocket
rocket.result: Launch animation on Contact section + special success message

space.name: Space mode
space.trigger: Open the site with ?mode=space in the URL
space.result: Nebula and stars on the hero (only while the URL param is present)

theme.name: Theme hunter
theme.trigger: Toggle light/dark theme 5 times in 3 seconds
theme.result: Color spectrum sweeps the page for 5 seconds

arrow.name: Curious arrow
arrow.trigger: 5 quick clicks on the hero arrow (does not scroll)
arrow.result: Animated arrow travels across the hero for 5 seconds
